w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Vietnamese Sign Language AI Learning Ecosystem
75 User Stories | 249 Acceptance Criteria | 7 Epics | May 2026
**Format:** As a `[Actor]`, I want `[Action]`, so that `[Benefit]`
**Priority:** 🔴 Must Have | 🟡 Should Have | 🟢 Could Have | ⚪ Won't Have (v1)
As a **Guest**, I want to log in with my email & password, so that I can access my personal learning data.
As a **Guest**, I want to log in via Google OAuth, so that I can sign up/in quickly without remembering a password.
As a **User**, I want to view my profile page, so that I can see my account info, streak, and XP total.
As a **User**, I want to update my display name and avatar, so that I can personalize my account.
As a **User**, I want to change my password, so that I can keep my account secure.
As a **User**, I want to log out, so that my account is safe on shared devices.
As a **Guest**, I want to request a password reset via email, so that I can recover my account if I forget my password.
As a **User**, I want to see Chapters inside a Unit, so that I can understand the learning structure.
As a **Basic User**, I want to see a lock icon on premium Chapters, so that I know which content requires an upgrade.
As a **User**, I want to see Lessons inside a Chapter listed in order, so that I can follow a structured learning path.
As a **User**, I want to watch a lesson video hosted on S3, so that I can learn VSL signs at my own pace.
As a **User**, I want my progress to be saved automatically when I finish a video, so that I don't lose my place if I come back later.
As a **User**, I want to see a progress bar per Chapter, so that I can track how many lessons I've completed.
As a **User**, I want the next lesson to unlock after completing the current one, so that content is delivered in a logical sequence.
As a **Basic User**, I want to be redirected to the upgrade page when clicking a locked Chapter, so that I understand how to gain access.
As a **User**, I want to resume a lesson I didn't finish, so that I don't have to restart from the beginning.
As a **User**, I want to see my score immediately after submitting a quiz, so that I know how well I performed.
As a **User**, I want to review correct and incorrect answers after finishing a quiz, so that I can learn from my mistakes.
As a **User**, I want to retake a quiz I failed, so that I can improve my score and unlock the next lesson.
As a **User**, I want my quiz to auto-submit when the timer runs out, so that my partial answers are still scored.
As a **User**, I want to navigate between questions freely during a timed test, so that I can manage my time strategically.
As a **User**, I want to see which questions I haven't answered before submitting, so that I don't accidentally skip questions.
As a **Premium User**, I want the system to recognize my hand signs using my device's camera without sending video to the server, so that my privacy is protected and the experience is fast.
As a **Premium User**, I want to see a confidence indicator while performing a sign, so that I know if the camera is reading my gesture correctly.
As a **Premium User**, I want to get instant feedback (correct/incorrect) after each sign attempt, so that I can immediately correct my technique.
As a **Premium User**, I want a warning when lighting is too low for hand detection, so that I can adjust my environment and avoid failed attempts.
As a **Basic User**, I want to see a preview of the AI Quiz feature locked behind Premium, so that I understand what I'm missing and feel motivated to upgrade.
As a **User**, I want to earn XP when I complete a quiz, so that assessments feel meaningful.
As a **User**, I want to see an XP
animation pop up after completing activities, so that earning XP feels exciting and immediate.
As a **User**, I want to see my total XP on my profile, so that I can track my overall progress.
As a **User**, I want my streak to visually increase when I learn on consecutive days, so that I feel a sense of momentum.
As a **User**, I want to clearly see when my streak resets (next day midnight UTC+7), so that I never feel cheated by an unexpected reset.
As a **User**, I want my longest streak to be recorded on my profile, so that I can show off my best record.
As a **User**, I want to earn bonus XP multipliers at streak milestones (7, 14, 30 days), so that maintaining a long streak feels increasingly rewarding.
As a **User**, I want to see a monthly leaderboard, so that I can track my long-term ranking.
As a **User**, I want to see my own rank highlighted on the leaderboard, so that I
As a **User**, I want to earn a badge when I reach XP milestones, so that overall learning volume is rewarded.
As a **User**, I want to earn a badge for completing my first lesson, so that beginners feel welcomed and encouraged.
As a **User**, I want to earn a badge for getting a perfect score on a quiz, so that high performance is recognized.
As a **User**, I want to view all badges I've earned on my profile, so that I can see all my achievements in one place.
As a **User**, I want to browse VSL signs by category (e.g., Greetings, Numbers, Family), so that I can explore signs by topic.
As a **User**, I want to search for a specific sign by name, so that I can quickly find what I'm looking for.
As a **User**, I want to watch a video demonstration of each sign, so that I can see the correct hand movement.
As a **User**, I want to see a difficulty level for each sign, so that I can choose signs appropriate for my skill level.
As a **User**, I want a "Practice this sign" button on dictionary entries, so that I can jump straight into AI practice for that sign.
As a **Basic User**, I want to view the premium pricing plans (Monthly/Yearly), so that I can choose the option that fits my budget.
As a **Basic User**, I want to pay for Premium using MoMo QR code, so that I can upgrade quickly using my preferred payment method.
As a **Basic User**, I want to pay for Premium using ZaloPay QR code, so that I have an alternative local payment option.
As a **Basic User**, I want my account to be upgraded to Premium immediately after a successful payment, so that I don't have to wait or contact support.
As a **User**, I want to see a payment confirmation screen after a successful transaction, so that I have proof that my payment went through.
As a **User**, I want to see a clear error message if my payment fails, so that I know what went wrong and can try again.
As a **User**, I want to view my subscription status and expiry date on my profile, so that I know when to renew.
As a **User**, I want to view my payment history, so that I can verify my transactions.
As an **Admin**, I want to create Chapters inside a Unit and set `is_premium`, so that I can control which content is free vs paid.
As an **Admin**, I want to upload lesson videos to S3 and link them to a Lesson, so that learners can watch video content
As an **Admin**, I want to create MCQ quiz questions with options and correct answers, so that I can build assessments for each lesson.
As an **Admin**, I want to create AI Quiz questions by specifying a `sign_label`, so that the system knows which sign to check during AI practice.
As an **Admin**, I want to add and edit Dictionary entries with video and category, so that learners have a reference resource.
As an **Admin**, I want to view a list of all registered users, so that I can monitor platform growth.
As an **Admin**, I want to see each user's subscription
status, so that I can handle support requests about account access.
As an **Admin**, I want to view all payment transactions with status (PENDING/SUCCESS/FAILED), so that I can reconcile payments and handle failed webhook cases.
As an **Admin**, I want to manually trigger a subscription status update for a specific transaction, so that I can resolve edge cases where webhook delivery failed.
As an **Admin**, I want to view a dashboard with total users, active subscriptions, and daily active learners, so that I can monitor business KPIs.
Assessment: MCQ Quiz + Timed Test + Payment flow
Dictionary + Admin dashboard + Polish + Bug fix
Epic 1: Authentication | Epic 2: Learning | Epic 3: Assessment
As a Guest, I want to register with email & password, so that I can create an account and start learning.
Given a valid unique email and password ≥ 8 characters → account is created, JWT token returned, user redirected to home.
Given an already-registered email → system returns error "Email này đã được sử dụng."
Given password < 8 characters or missing uppercase/number → inline validation error shown before submission.
Given invalid email format → form cannot be submitted, error shown under email field.
As a Guest, I want to log in with email & password, so that I can access my personal learning data.
Given correct email and password → JWT token issued, user redirected to dashboard.
Given wrong password (≤ 4 attempts) → error "Sai mật khẩu", attempt counter shown.
Given non-existent email → error "Tài khoản không tồn tại."
Given account is deactivated → error "Tài khoản đã bị khóa. Liên hệ hỗ trợ."
As a Guest, I want to log in via Google OAuth, so that I can sign in quickly without a password.
Given user clicks "Đăng nhập với Google" → redirected to Google consent screen.
Given successful Google auth → account auto-created if first time, JWT returned, redirected to dashboard.
Given user cancels Google consent → returned to login page, no account created.
Given Google account email already registered manually → accounts merged, login succeeds.
As a User, I want to view my profile page, so that I can see my account info, streak, and XP.
Profile page displays: full name, avatar, account type (Basic/Premium), total XP, current streak, longest streak.
If account is Premium, subscription end date is shown.
Earned badges are displayed in a grid on the profile page.
As a User, I want to update my display name and avatar, so that I can personalize my account.
Given user updates name and saves → new name reflected immediately across all pages.
Given user uploads a new avatar (JPG/PNG ≤ 2MB) → image saved to S3, displayed on profile.
Given file > 2MB → error "Ảnh không được vượt quá 2MB."
Given empty name field → save button is disabled.
As a User, I want to change my password, so that I can keep my account secure.
Given correct current password and valid new password → password updated, session remains active.
Given wrong current password → error "Mật khẩu hiện tại không đúng."
Given new password same as current → error "Mật khẩu mới phải khác mật khẩu cũ."
Given new password < 8 characters → validation error shown.
As a User, I want to log out, so that my account is safe on shared devices.
Given user clicks "Đăng xuất" → JWT token invalidated, redirected to login page.
After logout, navigating to a protected route redirects back to login.
Local storage/session storage is cleared on logout.
As a Guest, I want to request a password reset via email, so that I can recover my account.
Given registered email submitted → reset email sent within 1 minute with a link valid for 30 minutes.
Given unregistered email → generic message shown (do not reveal if email exists).
Given user clicks valid reset link → directed to set-new-password form.
Given expired reset link → error "Liên kết đã hết hạn. Vui lòng yêu cầu lại."
As a User, I want to see all Units listed with thumbnails, so that I understand what topics are available.
Each Unit card shows: thumbnail, title, number of chapters.
Unpublished Units are not visible to non-admin users.
Page renders correctly on mobile (responsive layout).
As a User, I want to see Chapters inside a Unit, so that I can understand the learning structure.
All published Chapters inside the selected Unit are listed in
Each Chapter card shows: title, number of lessons, user's completion progress (%).
and user is Basic → lock icon displayed.
US-11 — Hiển thị khóa Chapter Premium
As a Basic User, I want to see a lock icon on premium Chapters, so that I know which content requires upgrade.
Lock icon is visible before user clicks the chapter (no need to enter first).
Premium User sees no lock icon on any chapter.
First chapter (free chapter) always shows unlocked regardless of account type.
As a User, I want to see Lessons inside a Chapter listed in order, so that I can follow a structured path.
order with title, duration, and completion status badge.
Completed lessons show ✅ badge, in-progress show 🔄, not started show ⭕.
Lessons after a locked lesson are dimmed and unclickable until the previous is completed.
As a User, I want to watch a lesson video hosted on S3, so that I can learn VSL signs at my own pace.
Video loads via presigned S3 URL (not proxied through Spring Boot).
Video player supports: play/pause, seek, volume control, fullscreen.
Given S3 URL fails to load → placeholder shown: "Video tạm thời không khả dụng."
Video starts from last saved position if user previously watched it partially.
US-14 — Lưu tiến độ tự động
As a User, I want my progress saved automatically when I finish a video, so that I don't lose my place.
Progress is reflected immediately on the Chapter screen (no page refresh needed).
XP is awarded only once per lesson completion (idempotent).
As a User, I want to see a progress bar per Chapter, so that I can track how many lessons I've completed.
Progress bar updates in real time after completing a lesson.
100% completion → chapter card shows a "Hoàn thành" badge.
US-16 — Mở khóa bài học kế tiếp
As a User, I want the next lesson to unlock after completing the current one, so that content is sequential.
→ lesson N+1 is locked (dimmed, not clickable).
First lesson in each Chapter is always unlocked by default.
Lesson unlock does not require page refresh.
US-17 — Redirect Paywall khi click Chapter Premium
As a Basic User, I want to be redirected to the upgrade page when clicking a locked Chapter.
Basic User clicking a premium Chapter → Paywall modal/screen appears (not a full page redirect that loses context).
Paywall shows: benefits of Premium, price (49k/tháng), and a CTA button "Nâng cấp ngay".
Clicking "Nâng cấp ngay" navigates to the payment flow (UC-02).
Clicking "Đóng" dismisses the paywall and returns to the Chapter list.
US-18 — Resume bài học dang dở
As a User, I want to resume a lesson I didn't finish, so that I don't have to restart from the beginning.
→ video player auto-seeks to last saved timestamp on load.
A toast shows: "Tiếp tục từ 02:35" with option to "Xem lại từ đầu."
As a User, I want to take a multiple-choice quiz after a lesson, so that I can test my understanding.
Quiz displays questions one at a time with 4 answer options (A/B/C/D).
User can change answer before submitting.
Submit button only enabled when all questions have a selected answer.
Given Basic User on a premium lesson's quiz → blocked by Paywall.
As a User, I want to see my score immediately after submitting a quiz.
After submission → score displayed as: "X/N câu đúng — Y điểm."
→ "Đạt ✅" badge shown and next lesson unlocks.
XP is awarded immediately if passed (shown with animation).
As a User, I want to review correct and incorrect answers after finishing a quiz.
Each question shows: user's selected answer, correct answer, and explanation (if configured).
Wrong answers highlighted in red, correct in green.
Review screen accessible from the result screen without retaking the quiz.
As a User, I want to retake a quiz I failed, so that I can improve my score.
"Làm lại" button available on result screen if not passed.
On retake, questions are reshuffled and answer options reshuffled.
Best score (highest across all attempts) is saved to
XP is awarded only on first passing attempt (not on every retry).
US-23 — Thi thử có bấm giờ
As a User, I want to take a timed mock test with a countdown timer, so that I can simulate a real exam.
Timer starts immediately when the test begins, counts down from
Timer is displayed prominently (top of screen) and turns red when < 60 seconds remain.
Timer runs entirely client-side; server validates duration on submission.
Timer persists if user accidentally refreshes (stored in sessionStorage).
As a User, I want my quiz to auto-submit when the timer runs out.
Unanswered questions are scored as incorrect (no additional penalty).
Auto-submit toast: "⏰ Hết giờ! Đang nộp bài tự động..."
US-25 — Điều hướng tự do giữa các câu
As a User, I want to navigate between questions freely during a timed test.
Question navigator panel shows all question numbers; answered ones highlighted.
User can jump to any question by clicking its number.
Selected answer is saved in local state when navigating away.
US-26 — Cảnh báo câu chưa trả lời
As a User, I want to see which questions I haven't answered before submitting.
Clicking "Nộp bài" with unanswered questions → confirmation dialog: "Còn X câu chưa trả lời. Bạn có chắc muốn nộp?"
Unanswered question numbers are highlighted in yellow in the navigator.
User can cancel and return to complete missing answers.
As a Premium User, I want to practice sign language by performing signs in front of my camera, so that I get real-time AI feedback.
Camera activates only after user explicitly grants permission.
MediaPipe detects hand landmarks in real time with latency ≤ 200ms per frame.
A sign is confirmed as correct when
User receives instant visual feedback (✅/❌) within 500ms of confirmed detection.
Quiz submits only metadata to server (no video/image frames sent).
US-28 — Privacy-safe AI (no video to server)
As a Premium User, I want hand sign recognition done on my device, so that my privacy is protected.
No image or video frame is transmitted to the Spring Boot API at any point.
metadata is sent to server after quiz ends.
Network tab in browser DevTools shows no image/video payloads to backend.
MediaPipe WASM model runs entirely in browser context (verifiable via Source tab).
As a Premium User, I want to see a confidence indicator while performing a sign.
Confidence bar (0–100%) updates live on every frame (≤ 200ms refresh).
When confidence locks at ≥ 85% → bar freezes and result is confirmed.
US-30 — Phản hồi tức thì sau mỗi ký hiệu
As a Premium User, I want instant feedback after each sign attempt.
Correct sign → green overlay ✅ "Đúng rồi!" + sound effect + auto-advance to next question after 1.5s.
Incorrect sign (after timeout) → red overlay ❌ "Thử lại!" with hint image.
User can skip a question (max 2 skips per quiz session).
US-31 — Cảnh báo ánh sáng yếu
As a Premium User, I want a warning when lighting is too low for hand detection.
If no hand detected for > 5 consecutive seconds → warning shown: "Khó nhận diện. Thử tăng ánh sáng hoặc đổi nền."
Warning auto-dismisses when hand is detected again.
Timer pauses during the no-detection period (if timed quiz).
US-32 — Preview AI Quiz cho Basic User
As a Basic User, I want to see a preview of the AI Quiz feature, so that I feel motivated to upgrade.
Basic User sees a blurred/locked AI Quiz section with label "Tính năng Premium."
A teaser message describes the feature: "Luyện tập ký hiệu trực tiếp với AI."
CTA button "Nâng cấp để trải nghiệm" links to Payment flow.
Epic 4: Gamification | Epic 5: Dictionary | Epic 6: Monetization | Epic 7: Admin
US-33 — Nhận XP sau bài học
As a User, I want to earn XP when I complete a lesson, so that I feel rewarded for my progress.
XP is awarded only once per lesson (subsequent completions/retakes do not re-award).
Total XP on profile updates immediately after lesson completion.
As a User, I want to earn XP when I complete a quiz, so that assessments feel meaningful.
XP is awarded only on first passing attempt (not on retries).
As a User, I want to see an XP animation pop up after completing activities.
After earning XP → floating "+X XP" animation appears on screen for 2 seconds.
Animation is non-blocking (user can interact with other elements).
Animation reflects actual XP value (not a hardcoded number).
As a User, I want to see my total XP on my profile, so that I can track overall progress.
Profile displays total XP as sum of all
XP updates in real time after each earning event (no manual refresh needed).
US-37 — Xây dựng Streak hàng ngày
As a User, I want to build a daily learning streak, so that I stay motivated every day.
Completing at least 1 lesson or quiz per calendar day (UTC+7) increments
Streak increments only once per day regardless of how many activities completed.
is updated to today (UTC+7) on each qualifying activity.
: reset happens on next activity, not via background job.
As a User, I want my streak to visually increase when I learn on consecutive days.
After streak increments → 🔥 fire animation shows "Streak: X ngày!" on result screen.
Streak count on dashboard/profile header updates immediately.
On streak milestone days (7, 14, 30) → special celebration animation triggered.
US-39 — Thông báo reset Streak rõ ràng
As a User, I want to clearly see when my streak resets, so that I never feel cheated.
If streak has reset → message shown: "Streak đã bị reset. Hôm nay là Ngày 1 mới — cố lên!"
Dashboard shows a daily reminder widget: "Học hôm nay để giữ streak 🔥" (if not yet studied today).
Streak reset message is shown once per session, not repeatedly.
Help tooltip explains the reset rule clearly: "Streak reset nếu bạn bỏ qua 1 ngày (tính theo giờ VN UTC+7)."
As a User, I want my longest streak recorded on my profile.
only increases, never decreases (even when current streak resets).
US-41 — XP Multiplier theo Streak Milestone
As a User, I want bonus XP multipliers at streak milestones (7, 14, 30 days).
Multiplier displayed on result screen: "Streak Bonus: +Y XP (×1.5)".
Multiplier applies to Lesson XP and Quiz XP (not to Badge XP).
As a User, I want to see a weekly leaderboard ranked by XP.
Leaderboard shows top 50 users ranked by XP earned in the current calendar week (Mon–Sun UTC+7).
Each row shows: rank, avatar, name, weekly XP.
Leaderboard resets every Monday 00:00 UTC+7 (historical data kept in
Page loads leaderboard data within 2 seconds.
As a User, I want to see a monthly leaderboard.
Monthly tab shows top 50 users by XP earned in current calendar month.
User can toggle between Weekly and Monthly tabs without page reload.
Monthly leaderboard resets on the 1st of each month.
US-44 — Highlight vị trí của mình
As a User, I want to see my own rank highlighted on the leaderboard.
Current user's row is highlighted with a distinct background color.
If user is outside top 50 → a pinned row at the bottom shows their rank and XP.
"Bạn đang ở hạng #X" label shown above or below the leaderboard.
As a User, I want to earn a badge when I hit streak milestones (7, 14, 30 days).
At streak 7 → Badge "🔥 Tuần Lửa" awarded. At 14 → "⚡ Kiên Trì". At 30 → "🏆 Bất Khuất".
Badge award is idempotent (same badge not awarded twice).
Badge notification popup shown immediately when milestone reached.
As a User, I want to earn a badge when I reach XP milestones.
At 100 XP, 500 XP, 1000 XP, 5000 XP → corresponding badge awarded.
Badge granted within the same API response that credited the XP.
US-47 — Badge bài học đầu tiên
As a User, I want to earn a badge for completing my first lesson.
Badge shown with welcome message: "Chào mừng! Bạn đã hoàn thành bài học đầu tiên."
As a User, I want to earn a badge for getting a perfect score on a quiz.
on a quiz attempt → Badge "⭐ Hoàn Hảo" awarded.
Badge awarded once per quiz type (not once per attempt).
US-49 — Xem tất cả Badge trên Profile
As a User, I want to view all badges I've earned on my profile.
Profile shows a badge gallery with earned badges in color and unearned badges grayed out.
Hovering/clicking a badge shows its name and the condition to earn it.
US-50 — Duyệt từ điển không cần đăng nhập
As a Guest, I want to browse the VSL dictionary without logging in.
route is publicly accessible without JWT token.
All published dictionary entries are returned by the public API endpoint.
No "Login required" gate appears on the dictionary page.
US-51 — Lọc từ điển theo danh mục
As a User, I want to browse VSL signs by category.
Selecting a category filters the grid to show only entries in that category.
"Tất cả" option resets the filter and shows all entries.
Category filter is reflected in the URL (e.g.,
As a User, I want to search for a specific sign by name.
Search is triggered on input (debounced 300ms) or on pressing Enter.
No results → message: "Không tìm thấy ký hiệu nào cho '[keyword]'."
Search works in combination with category filter.
US-53 — Xem video minh họa ký hiệu
As a User, I want to watch a video demonstration of each sign.
Video loads within 3 seconds on standard broadband.
Video autoplays (muted) on the detail page; user can unmute.
Video streams via S3 presigned URL (not proxied by backend).
If video unavailable → placeholder image with message "Video đang được cập nhật."
US-54 — Mức độ khó của ký hiệu
As a User, I want to see a difficulty level for each sign.
Difficulty badge shown on each dictionary card: Beginner (🟢) / Intermediate (🟡) / Advanced (🔴).
User can filter dictionary by difficulty level.
US-55 — Nút "Luyện tập ngay" từ Từ điển
As a Premium User, I want a "Practice this sign" button on dictionary entries.
"Luyện tập ngay" button visible on detail page for Premium Users.
Button links to the AI Quiz lesson most relevant to that sign (by
If no matching lesson exists → button hidden or shows "Chưa có bài luyện tập."
Basic User sees button as locked with "Premium" badge.
As a Basic User, I want to see a clear paywall screen when accessing premium content.
Paywall appears as a modal overlay (not a full redirect) to preserve context.
Paywall lists ≥ 3 Premium benefits clearly (AI Quiz, all Chapters, etc.).
CTA button "Nâng cấp Premium — 49.000đ/tháng" is prominent and clickable.
"Để sau" / "Đóng" button dismisses the paywall without data loss.
As a Basic User, I want to view premium pricing plans.
Pricing page shows at minimum: Monthly (49.000đ) plan with features list.
Plan selection is visually distinct (selected plan highlighted with border).
"Tiếp tục thanh toán" button is disabled until a plan is selected.
As a Basic User, I want to pay for Premium using MoMo QR code.
Clicking "Thanh toán MoMo" → QR code generated and displayed within 3 seconds.
QR code has a 5-minute countdown timer shown below it.
from webhook → account upgraded within 5 seconds of payment.
As a Basic User, I want to pay for Premium using ZaloPay QR code.
ZaloPay option available alongside MoMo on payment screen.
ZaloPay QR generated using ZaloPay's create-order API, displayed within 3 seconds.
Webhook from ZaloPay handled and verified (HMAC signature check).
Behavior after success identical to MoMo flow (US-58 AC4).
US-60 — Nâng cấp tài khoản ngay sau thanh toán
As a Basic User, I want my account upgraded to Premium immediately after successful payment.
User can access premium content within 10 seconds of payment confirmation.
If webhook fails or is delayed → account is NOT upgraded prematurely.
US-61 — Màn hình xác nhận thanh toán
As a User, I want to see a payment confirmation screen after success.
Success screen shows: "Chúc mừng! Bạn đã là thành viên Premium 🎉", plan details, and expiry date.
CTA button "Khám phá ngay" navigates to the full Unit list.
Confirmation screen accessible even if user navigates away and comes back.
US-62 — Thông báo lỗi thanh toán
As a User, I want a clear error message if my payment fails.
from webhook → error screen: "Thanh toán không thành công. Vui lòng thử lại."
Error screen offers: "Thử lại" (regenerate QR) and "Chọn phương thức khác."
As a Premium User, I want to view my subscription status and expiry date.
Profile shows subscription badge: "Premium — Hết hạn: DD/MM/YYYY."
If expiry is within 7 days → yellow warning: "Gói sắp hết hạn. Gia hạn ngay."
As a User, I want to view my payment history.
Payment history shows: date, provider, amount, status (SUCCESS/FAILED/PENDING).
displayed for each transaction (for user-side reconciliation).
As an Admin, I want to create, edit, and delete Units.
Admin can create a Unit with: title, description, thumbnail (uploaded to S3), order_index.
to show/hide a Unit for learners.
Deleting a Unit with existing Chapters → confirmation warning shown; cascade delete or block enforced.
can be reordered via drag-and-drop or input field.
As an Admin, I want to create Chapters and set
Admin can create a Chapter inside a Unit with: title, order_index, is_premium toggle.
→ immediately blocks Basic Users from accessing that Chapter.
Admin can move a Chapter between Units (reassign
US-67 — Upload video bài học lên S3
As an Admin, I want to upload lesson videos to S3 and link them to a Lesson.
Admin selects video file (MP4/MOV ≤ 500MB) → uploaded directly to S3 via presigned upload URL.
Upload progress bar shown in Admin UI.
If upload fails → error message shown,
Admin can replace an existing video (old S3 object optionally deleted).
As an Admin, I want to create MCQ quiz questions with options and correct answers.
Admin can add a question with question text, 4 options, and mark exactly 1 as correct.
System prevents saving without exactly 1 correct answer selected.
Admin can preview the quiz from the learner's perspective.
US-69 — Tạo câu hỏi AI Quiz
As an Admin, I want to create AI Quiz questions by specifying a
(e.g., "xin_chao") matching the AI model's label vocabulary.
Admin can optionally add a hint image or description for the learner.
must not be empty and must match a predefined label list.
US-70 — Quản lý Từ điển VSL
As an Admin, I want to add and edit Dictionary entries.
Admin can create/edit: sign_name, category, description, video_url, thumbnail_url, difficulty_level.
Video upload follows same S3 flow as lesson videos.
Admin can delete a Dictionary entry (soft delete or hard delete with confirmation).
Changes reflect on the public Dictionary page immediately.
US-71 — Xem danh sách người dùng
As an Admin, I want to view a list of all registered users.
User list shows: name, email, account_type, registration date, last active.
Admin can search users by email or name.
List is paginated (20 users per page).
US-72 — Xem subscription status của user
As an Admin, I want to see each user's subscription status.
User detail page shows: subscription status (ACTIVE/EXPIRED), start date, end date.
US-73 — Xem toàn bộ giao dịch thanh toán
As an Admin, I want to view all payment transactions with status.
Transaction table shows: user email, provider, amount,
Admin can filter by status (PENDING / SUCCESS / FAILED / REFUNDED).
(webhook body) viewable on transaction detail for debugging.
US-74 — Thủ công cập nhật trạng thái giao dịch
As an Admin, I want to manually trigger a subscription update for a failed webhook case.
Doing so triggers the same logic as webhook: create Subscription, upgrade account_type.
Only Super Admin role can perform manual override (not regular Admin).
As an Admin, I want a dashboard with total users, active subscriptions, and daily active learners.
Dashboard shows: Total Users, Premium Users count, Daily Active Users (DAU), Weekly Revenue.
Revenue chart shows daily/weekly revenue from successful
Data refreshes every 5 minutes (or on manual refresh).
